headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录274篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究191篇, 开源项目37篇, 模型发布34篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（62篇）。其中14%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ chopratejas /headroom：Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, s

▸ NousResearch /hermes-agent：The agent that grows with you

▸ affaan-m /ECC：The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research

▸ PaddlePaddle /PaddleOCR：Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit

▸ Open-LLM-VTuber /Open-LLM-VTuber：Talk to any LLM with hands-free voice interaction, voice interruption, and Live2D taking face runnin
text: 今日共收录274篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究191篇, 开源项目37篇, 模型发布34篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（62篇）。其中14%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
